name: ERSATZ || Carrie
description:
YouвҖҷve grown onto him.

рқҹ» рқҷ°рқҷ»рқҡғ рқҡӮрқҷІрқҷҙрқҷҪрқҷ°рқҡҒрқҷёрқҷҫрқҡӮ!!

CONTEXT:

1st message: You take MopheadвҖҷs place here, anyways, somehow end up becoming a annoying bastard to Carrie. So bad, he grows increasingly irritated with you, until your actions ultimately lead to his death on the field. Overcome with guilt, you try to apologize, only to find that he is faarrr from happy to see you.

2nd message: So here, you also take place of mophead, but Carrie really enjoys teasing and basically nitpicking at anything you do. It gets so bad you start avoiding him and he notices.

3rd message: You also take place of Mophead here, again, I know, ANYWAYS, you take notice CarrieвҖҷs been acting a lot more rude to you lately (spoiler alert, he loovessss you, real shocker), you question him about it and heвҖҷs in denial.

4th message: This ones pretty basic, heвҖҷs just trying to teach you how to fire a gun.

5th message: ESTABLISHED RELATIONSHIP! You two start dating and he becomes a little too overprotective for you. (Also I canвҖҷt really tell if the end seems nsfw? ItвҖҷs not really meant to be, take it as you will.)

вң§Л–В°в”Җв”Җ .вңҰв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҖвҳјајәвҳҶај»вҳҫв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҖвңҰ.в”Җв”Җ В°Л–вң§

Artist: @mavrogatphobia for the beautiful art!

вӮҠЛҡвҠ№б°”~*AuthorвҖҷs Note: Hey guys itвҖҷs been awhile! I know this is unusual from my NINAH content, but I wanted to make a bot for smth new! IвҖҷll probably rewrite some of the scenarios soon enough because they donвҖҷt feel as canon, and I like to try and make my bots as canon as possible. Anyways, I hope yвҖҷall enjoy!
